summary: Run verification queries: SELECT corpus_metadata, tradition counts, edge count, self-similarity smoke test (<=> distance 0 for a known chunk against itself)

resolution.note: All verification queries pass. corpus_metadata matches expected pinned values; per-tradition chunk counts sum to 2531; self-similarity = 0 with nearest-other at 0.227 cosine distance (vectors round-tripped correctly via the ::vector cast). Full-scan performance is fine at this corpus size; HNSW index emission in export.py is a follow-up for future ticket.
